judge_reason: Description B claims handwritten annotations are present while Description A does not, and they disagree on the presence of 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps versus only a 'COPY' stamp, indicating contradictory visual content.
original_image_tags: A typed memorandum on aged paper with punch holes at the top. A faint blue stamp reads "COPY" in the upper right corner.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Scanned typewritten memorandum page on yellowed paper, stamped “CONFIDENTIAL” at the top and bottom and “COPY” in the upper right, with three punch holes along the top; a typed header includes “Incident 4A 1208 I” and date “16 July 1947.”*
